result.description: Labcoat is the Rust-native CLI for building, testing, and operating Alkanes smart contracts with a complete local Bitcoin devnet.

errorCodes.meaning: the project wallet does not exist
the keystore could not be unlocked
the configured gateway cannot be reached
indexed height did not catch chain height
spendable BTC cannot cover the operation
errorCodes.recovery: fund the wallet and mine a block
inspect the revert reason and trace

errorCodes.meaning: a decoded trace did not arrive in time
an Alkanes transaction envelope is invalid
the requested Cargo contract package was not discovered
errorCodes.recovery: run `labcoat build` or pass a package listed in the error
build the deployed source revision and verify the contract ID

errorCodes.meaning: a contract name or ID could not be resolved

mcpTools.description: Boot the managed local Alkanes devnet services (downloads binaries when missing). Returns service status and the endpoint manifest.
mcpTools.name: devnet_up

mcpTools.description: Devnet service health, block height, and mempool size.
mcpTools.name: devnet_status

mcpTools.description: Send BTC from the devnet faucet wallet to an address.
mcpTools.name: devnet_fund

mcpTools.description: Stop services and wipe all devnet chain data.
mcpTools.name: devnet_reset

mcpTools.description: Create or load the project wallet keystore. Optional mnemonic (else generated).
mcpTools.name: wallet_init

mcpTools.description: Wallet receive addresses per script type.
mcpTools.name: wallet_addresses

mcpTools.description: Build Cargo contract packages and extract their Wasm-exported ABIs.
mcpTools.name: build

mcpTools.description: Build every contract for WASIp1 and run host integration tests; the first build may take several minutes.
mcpTools.name: test

mcpTools.description: Fetch ABI metadata from a deployed contract through Metashrew.
mcpTools.name: abi_fetch

mcpTools.description: Compare a deployed ABI with a locally built contract package.
mcpTools.name: abi_verify

mcpTools.description: Build and deploy an exact Cargo contract package, or deploy an explicit raw Wasm. Provide exactly one of package or wasm.

args.description: cellpack args: decimal u128, 0x-hex, or short strings (≤16 bytes)

wasm.description: explicit path to raw .wasm; skips compilation

mcpTools.name: deploy

mcpTools.description: Execute a state-changing contract call and wait for its trace.

args.description: cellpack args: decimal u128, 0x-hex, or short strings (≤16 bytes)

opcode.description: exact ABI method name or decimal opcode

mcpTools.name: call

mcpTools.description: Simulate a deployed contract against live indexed chain state (no transaction).

args.description: cellpack args: decimal u128, 0x-hex, or short strings (≤16 bytes)

opcode.description: exact ABI method name or decimal opcode

mcpTools.name: simulate

mcpTools.description: Decoded protostone traces for a transaction.
mcpTools.name: trace

protocol.detail: [block, tx, opcode, ...args] as u128 values; strings up to 16 bytes are packed little-endian.
protocol.name: Cellpack

protocol.detail: Targets [1, 0]; raw Wasm is compressed inside a taproot commit/reveal envelope.
protocol.name: Deploy

protocol.detail: Trace output for protostone i is transaction.output.len + 1 + i; Labcoat computes it automatically.
protocol.name: Protostone outputs

protocol.detail: State-changing operations wait until the Alkanes index reaches chain height before reading fresh state.
protocol.name: Synchronization

protocol.detail: Per-network deployment ledger mapping names to Alkanes IDs, Wasm hashes, transaction IDs, and status.
protocol.name: labcoat.lock

protocol.detail: Named calls use the generated local ABI when its Wasm hash matches labcoat.lock; otherwise they use deployed __meta metadata. Execution always targets deployed code, and numeric opcodes remain the raw cellpack escape hatch.
protocol.name: Contract ABI
